_note: An allowlisted target's harness STILL RUNS and REPORTS its observed failures (xfail-that-runs); it just doesn't fail CI. The inverse is enforced too: `tautc parity` FAILS if an allowlisted target passes fully (a green target must be de-listed) or a gated (non-allowlisted) target fails. Reasons are populated from observed `tautc parity` results.
